title: Bhp And China Yuan Settlements Mark A New Phase In The Iron Ore Dispute
section_path: Bhp And China Yuan Settlements Mark A New Phase In The Iron Ore Dispute
section_path_text: Bhp And China Yuan Settlements Mark A New Phase In The Iron Ore Dispute
summary:
Main
By Panagiota Kinti
Recent developments have brought the BHP-China dispute back into focus. BHP has reportedly agreed to settle around 30% of its spot iron ore sales to China in yuan, a move aimed at easing trade tensions that had disrupted flows earlier this year. Market observers view this as a quiet but symbolic step in the broader "commodities de-dollarization" trend, reflecting China's long-term ambition to reduce its dependence on U.S.
